name: the-health-gap
description: Michael Marmot's The Health Gap — public health and social justice toolkit revealing how social inequality determines health outcomes through the social gradient, status syndrome, and the conditions of life, with evidence-based policy solutions for a fairer, healthier world
useCase: Understand social determinants of health, the Whitehall gradient, status syndrome, and what policies close the health gap
knownRisks: The book is heavily UK-focused — some policy recommendations may not apply in different contexts
Health inequality is politically charged — some readers may reject the premise
The book contains extensive epidemiological data that some readers may find dense
